title: xyris jataiana
intro: Xyris jataiana, also known as the yellow-eyed grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Xyridaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Xyris jataiana include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Xyris jataiana can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
